statement: AI-generated code that passes tests may still contain security vulnerabilities (45% rate per Veracode 2025) or performance anti-patterns invisible to functional testing. Run a three-minute triage after every AI code change: linter, type checker, existing tests. This catches roughly 60% of AI code failures before deeper review.

evidenceRefs.title: Agentic AI Coding: Best Practice Patterns — CodeScene (Feb 2026)

publicSummary: Three-minute triage (lint, typecheck, test) catches ~60% of AI code failures. Security and performance bugs need additional verification beyond functional tests.
cautionNotes: The 45% vulnerability rate is aggregate; rates vary by language (Java higher, Python lower).
